objectives: Implement IR module (ir/types.rs, ir/lower.rs, ir/mod.rs) for mx20022-codegen
Lower xsd::Schema AST to TypeGraph IR
Pass cargo check, clippy -D warnings, and cargo test -p mx20022-codegen
constraints: Clippy pedantic with specific allows in workspace Cargo.toml
cargo fmt --all must produce no diff
important_facts: indexmap = '2' added to [workspace.dependencies] in root Cargo.toml
pub mod ir added to crates/mx20022-codegen/src/lib.rs
TypeGraph uses IndexMap<String, TypeDef> for insertion-order preservation
xml_to_snake_case handles PascalCase, all-caps runs (BICFI->bicfi), FIToFI->fi_to_fi
code_to_pascal_case converts ADDR->Addr, CODU->Codu, handles hyphen splits
map_builtin strips xs:/xsd: prefix before matching
decisions_made: SimpleType with zero facets or only non-enum facets becomes NewtypeDef: xs:simpleType with empty restriction is still a valid newtype
SimpleType with ALL facets being Enumeration becomes CodeEnumDef: mixed enum+constraint facets treated as Newtype (no ISO 20022 schema has this pattern)
Variant names for Choice types kept verbatim (already PascalCase in ISO 20022): no snake_case conversion for enum variants
RustType::Decimal used for xs:decimal and all integer/float variants: can be refined to rust_decimal later without IR change
Cardinality::Vec used for both min=0 and min=1 unbounded: non-empty enforcement is a validate-crate concern

iteration.summary: Implemented the complete IR module for mx20022-codegen. The ir/types.rs file defines TypeGraph, TypeDef (Struct/Enum/Newtype/CodeEnum/ValueWithAttr/Opaque), FieldDef with Cardinality, TypeRef, RustType, and Constraint. The ir/lower.rs file implements the lower() function mapping xsd::Schema to TypeGraph, plus xml_to_snake_case and code_to_pascal_case name converters. 54 unit tests and 5 doc tests all pass. cargo check, clippy -D warnings, fmt --check all clean.
